message:
test(fcp-core): rustfmt + restructure capability_verifier_predicate_matrix iter loop

Two small no-logic adjustments to the existing capability-verifier
predicate matrix test:

- Imports are reordered so CAPABILITY_TOKEN_CLOCK_SKEW_SECS sorts
  ahead of the type imports — pure rustfmt drift, no symbol changes.
- The per-case error-extraction inside the rejection loop is rewritten
  from a chained `.unwrap_err()` call to a `match … { Ok(_) => panic!,
  Err(e) => e }` form so a future regression where verify_bound starts
  returning Ok for a case the matrix expects to reject surfaces with a
  precise per-case panic message instead of a generic
  "called `Result::unwrap_err` on an `Ok` value" stack trace.

Behavior is unchanged for the green path — the same error variant is
extracted from the same call against the same matrix entries — but the
failure-mode diagnostic is sharper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
